ocr.text: In the Rehabilitation and Closure provisions table, Site A has a current rehabilitation cost of $20M, a future liability of $15M,
reflecting a change from last year of 5% and 10%, respectively, with an overview indicating 30% and 50%.

Site B shows a current rehabilitation cost of $25M, a future liability of $18M, with a change from last year of 3% and 8%,
respectively, and an overview of 35% and 40%. Site C has a current rehabilitation cost of $30M and a future liability of $22M,
with changes from last year of 2% and 6%, and an overview of 25% and 45%. Site D reports a current rehabilitation cost of
$15M, a future liability of $12M, with changes from last year of 4% and 7%, and an overview of 20% and 35%. Site E lists a
current rehabilitation cost of $10M, a future liability of $8M, with changes from last year of 1% and 5%, and an overview of
15% and 30%. Total sites amount to $100M in current rehabilitation costs, $75M in future liability, with changes of 15% and
6%, and an overview of 100% and 40%. Provisions adjustments total $5M, with 2% and 4% changes, leading to a total adjusted
value of $3M. In the Financial Overview, total revenue stands at $300M, net income at $50M, gross profit at $100M, operating
margin at 16.7%, EBITDA at $80M, CAPEX at $30M, production costs at $120M, sales volume at 200,000 tons, average price
at $1,500, sales revenue at $300M, cash flow at $40M, debt levels at 8.0%, total assets at $2.5B, return on equity at 12.5%,
market share showing a 15% increase, and a dividend payout reflecting a 15% increase. Other entries include $280M total
revenue, $45M net income, $95M gross profit, 16.1% operating margin, $78M EBITDA, $32M CAPEX, $115M production
costs, 190,000 tons sales volume, $1,550 average price, $290M sales revenue, $42M cash flow, 7.9% debt levels, $2.4B total
assets, 12.3% return on equity, and a 14% increase in market share.
